title: LOLYSIC 40Pcs Tent Pegs Metal Heavy Duty Rock Pegs for Awnings Camping Pegs Galvanized Steel Ground Pegs Stakes for Outdoor Camping Awning Tarpaulin, 25cm / 10 inch
features: Storm-Proof Tent Pegs: Our tent pegs metal heavy duty are made up of solid galvanized steel, tough and rust proof, ideal for outdoor camp whether raining, snowing, windy, even storm. These hard ground tent pegs with high grip can grab into the solid ground and fix your tent tightly.
Easy To Use: The sharp end of the rock pegs for awnings can be easily nailed to the ground, not easily bent and deformed. Please don't hit the plastic top prevent destroy it.

Versatile Usage: Heavy duty tent pegs for hard ground are suitable for various outdoor activities like gardening, camping, fishing, hiking, mountain climbing, backpacking to fix the groundsheets, tents, netting, windbreaks, awnings and more.

Package Content: You will get 40 pcs of tent pegs for hardstanding in orange plastic head. The length for the awning pegs for hard ground is approx 25cm (10 inch), diameter of the steel rod is approx 6mm.

Excellent Service: If there is any problem after receiving the 25cm tent pegs heavy duty (lost/ missing part/ unsatisfied/ other), please feel free to let us know and solve the issues better for you, thank you!
description: LOLYSIC Tent Pegs Metal Heavy Duty Hard Ground Tent Pegs Caravan Awning Pegs Hard Ground Rock Pegs for Awnings Tent Pegs for Camping Awning Tarpaulin Specification: Material: Solid Steel + Plastic Color: Orange Length: 25cm / 9.8 inch Rod Diameter: 6mm/ 0.2 inch Quantity: 40 x heavy duty tent pegs for hard ground Feature: ● Durable solid steel heavy duty tent pegs won't bend easily and rust proof. ● Sharpened end rock pegs for hard standing are easily nailed to hard ground. ● Plastic cap with holes convenient for fastening and pull off. ● Ideal 10 inch tent pegs metal camping for tents, football nets, netting, awning, groundsheets for most outdoor activities, camping, hiking, climbing, gardening, backpacking. Note: If you find something damaged or lost when receiving the heavy duty tent pegs 25cm, please kindly let us know and solve the issues better for you. Thank you!
